basic_details.job_title: Karmayogi Bharat Database Administrator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Database Administration, or related field required; Master’s Degree preferred, Certifications in database administration (e.g., Oracle Certified Professional, Microsoft Certified Database Administrator), 6+ Years Experience with cloud-based databases and migration strategies w.r.t. SQL Server, Postgres, MongoDB, Familiarity with HR systems or eHRMS 2.0 platforms
qualification.details: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Database Administration, or related field required; Master’s Degree preferred. Certifications in database administration (e.g., Oracle Certified Professional, Microsoft Certified Database Administrator). 6+ Years Experience with cloud-based databases and migration strategies w.r.t. SQL Server, Postgres, MongoDB. Familiarity with HR systems or eHRMS 2.0 platforms.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Karmayogi Bharat Database Administrator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Karmayogi Bharat Database Administrator Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Karmayogi Bharat Database Administrator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 22 June 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Database Administrator post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 1 vacancies announced for the Database Administrator position in this recruitment drive by Karmayogi Bharat.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required educational qualification for the Database Administrator role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Database Administration, or a related field. A Master’s degree is preferred.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any experience required for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates need to have at least 6 years of experience with cloud-based databases and migration strategies, specifically with SQL Server, Postgres, and MongoDB.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Database Administrator position?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely via email. Interested candidates need to send their resume and relevant documents to the official email address provided by Karmayogi Bharat.

faq.question: Q8. Does Karmayogi Bharat offer any specific certifications for this role?
faq.answer: While not a requirement for applying, certifications in database administration such as Oracle Certified Professional or Microsoft Certified Database Administrator are preferred and can strengthen an application.

faq.question: Q9. Is there an age limit mentioned for the Database Administrator position?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limit for this position. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates or specific requirements.

faq.question: Q10. What kind of familiarity is expected regarding HR systems?
faq.answer: Candidates are expected to have familiarity with HR systems or eHRMS 2.0 platforms, which is a key requirement for the Database Administrator role.
